title: Gas leh tuialhthei chungchanga Serchhip District mipuite hriattirna
content:
32/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 2nd April, 2026:Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs Department chuan tunlai khawvel geo politics boruak avanga eirawngbawlna Gas leh Tuialhthei chungchangah Serchhip District mipuite tana hriat tur chhuah thaa hriain Serchhip DC Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan a hnuaia hriattirna hi a chhuah:

Tun dinhmunah Serchhip District chhungah Gas leh Tuialhtheiah harsatna kan la tawk lova, kan neih te hian mipui mamawh min la phuhru zova, mipuite tan hlauhthawn tur a awm lova, kan dinhmunte uluk taka vil reng a ni a, mipuite chi ai lo turin kan in ngen e.

Petrol/Diesel leh Gas black-a hralh hmu leh hria kan awm a nih chuan a hnuaia helpline No. tarlanah hian report vat turin kan in ngen e.

Helpline No: 03838 222432/9612959363

title: FOOD, CIVIL SUPPLIES & CONSUMER AFFAIRS DEPARTMENT THUCHHUAH
content:
31/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 2ndApril, 2026 :Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas (MoPNG) chuan State-tin ten nikhat atana commercial LPG cylinder an pek chhuah theih zat chungchangah thupek chhuahin, tun dinhmuna Mizoram chhunga Commercial cylinder pekchhuah theih zat chu ni khatah bur 60 a ni a.

MoPNG chuan commercial LPG cylinder hmangtu sector hrang hrang te pek dan tur hetiang hian a duang a:

1. Damdawiin leh Zirna in ten an nitin mamawh chu 100% pek theih an ni. Mahse, heng Damdawiin leh Zirna in te hian an nitin mamawh zat chu thla khat chhunga an hman dan a zira chhut tur a ni a, hei hi OMC-in data a pek atanga hmuh theih a ni.

Entirna:Hospital pakhat in geo politics buaina awm hma khan thla khat chhungin bur 30 hmang ta se, thlakhat chhungin nitin bur 1 zel hmang ang an ni. Chuvangin, nitin bur 1 zel pek theih an ni.

2. Service sector dang Hospitality/Industrial canteen/catering sector, etc. te chu thla khat chhunga an hman thin zat atanga 20% nitin pek chhuah theih a ni.

Entirna:Hotel pakhatin thla khat chhungin bur 90 hmang ral ta se, a tlangpuiin nitin a an hman zat chu bur 3 ang a ni. Tichuan bur 3 atanga 20% chu 0.6 niin, bur 1 ang pek theih an ni.

3. Commercial Cylinder chungchanga harsatna awmte chinfel a nih theih nan Directorate of FCS&CA chuan rualkhai takin a semchhuak thin a. Consumer ten an dil ni vekah an lak theih nan, nitina Cylinder diltute list chu DCSO ten Directorate-ah chhun dar 12 hma in an thehlut tur a ni a, dilna format hi duan sa a ni.

4. Tun dinhmunah nitin cylinder 60 aia tam pek chhuah theih a ni lo.

He inkaihhruaina hi Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas (MoPNG) in State zawng zawng te hman tura a siam a nih angin mipui te hriatthiamna FCS&CA Department chuan a ngen e.

ISSUED BY FOOD, CIVIL SUPPLIES & CONSUMER AFFAIRS DEPARTMENT GOVERNMENT OF MIZORAM

title: Important Notice
content:
2/2026-2027

Information & Communication Technology has informed all users that the Government of Mizoram domain (mizoram.gov.in) is currently undergoing a Domain Name Server (DNS) upgrade.

Consequently, services hosted under this domain may remain unavailable from 09:00 PM on 2nd April 2026 to 09:00 PM on 4th April 2026 (48 hours).

The ICT Department requests the cooperation and understanding of all stakeholders and the general public during this period. Normal services will resume immediately upon successful completion of the DNS upgrade and propagation.

title: Chief Secretary in Kolasib District a NHIDCL kawng siam hna thawh mek  te a hmunah a enfiah
content:
27/2026-2027

Dated Kolasib the 2nd April 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Chief Secretary, Pu Khilli Ram Meena chuan Kolasib District a 4 lane kawng laih mek leh tun dinhmuna kawngpui hman lai mek NH306&06 te chu a hmunah kal chilhin, kawng siamtu- NHIDCL leh Contractor te chu a chak thei ang bera an hna la peihfel loh te thawk turin a hriattir.

Chief secretary hian Counter Insurgency and Jungle Warfare School (CIJWS) Vairengte pawh tlawhin hetah hian ram neitute nen ram inhlan chungchanga chinfel leh bawhzui ngai la awm te CIJW hotute nen an sawiho a. CIJW atang hian Kolasib lam pan chho in 4 lane kawng laih mek te leh kawngpui hman mek thawmthat hna kal mek te hi a hmunah a enfiah nghal a ni.

Kolasib DC Conference Hall ah Pu H Dolianbuaia ,Kolasib DC kaihhruaina hnuaiah NHIDCL aiawhte leh Department hrang hrang hotute nen inkawmhona neih chhunzawm a ni a . He hunah hian Chief Secretary chuan National Highway 306&06 thawmthat hna hi hun rei tak chhung thawh a nih tawh hnuah pawh, chhuanlam chi hrang hrang vanga peihfel a la ni thei lo chu pawi a tih thu a sawi a. Nikum lamah pawh he hna hi chak taka kalpui a nih theih nan amah ngei Kolasib-ah kalin hma a lo la tawh a, hemi chungchanga NHIDCL aiawhtenin an tiam anga hna an la hlen chhuak lo chu a lungawithlak loh takzet a ni, a ti.

Hna an zawh theih loh chhan atana an harsatna tarlante chu chhuanlam tlingah a ngai lo tih sawiin, 'Chhuanlam siam tum tan chuan chhuanlam tur a awm reng thin a, amaherawhchu, a taka hnathawh kan hmu duh a ni,' a ti. NHIDCL aiawhte chu an contractor rawihte khauh taka thunun tur leh, tun aia chak lehzuala hma la turin a chah a; he kawng siamthat hna kal mek chu April thla chhung ngeia peih fel vek turin a hriattir nghal bawk a ni.

NHIDCL aiawhten an tarlan danin, Vairengte leh Sairang inkar kawngpui- STMC hna thawh mekah a hmun laipui pathum (Km 42–70, Km 95–118, leh Km 133–147.8) ahte hna hi 100% thawh zawh a ni tawh a ni, an ti a.

Amaherawhchu, hmun thenkhat(Km 70–95, Km 118–133, leh Km 147.8–159), July 2025-a PWD kut atanga an lak erawh kawng a chhiat tawh em avangin a tirah harsatna lian tak an tawk tih sawiin, hemi avang hian an contract hna tak tak an tan theih hmain, lirthei tlan theih hram nan thla thum chuang emergency repair hna an thawh thu an sawi.

Hetianga khawtlai na a awm chung hian, alkatra chhah chi (DBM), concrete phah (PQC), leh kawng lung rem (foundation layers) te phah mekin chak takin hna an thawk chhunzawm zel a; heng kawng la bakah te hian 30% leh 48% hna thawh zawh tawh a ni , an ti a . April 2026 chhungin he thawmthat hna hi peih fel vek turin theih tawp an chhuah thu an tarlang.

Chief Secretary hian Kolasiba NHIDCL aiawhte leh Department hotute inkawmhona a neih pui zawh hian Sairang lam pan in, kawng thawmthat mek hi a en zui nghal a ni.

Vawiina Mizoram Chief Secretary, Pu Khilli Ram Meena in Kolasiba NHIDCL aiawhte leh an hnuaia  contractor te inkawmhona a neihpuina ah hian Kolasib DC Pu H Dolianbuaia bakah Pu Laltlanhlua Zathang, CCF, Mizoram , Pu Lalnunsanga, CF (Northern Circle) , Pu Robin Lalrinawma, CE, Highways, PWD, Pi B Malsawmsangi, Addl DC Kolasib, Pu Vanlalrova Adll DC Aizawl leh Kolasiba Department hrang hotute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Khelo India Tribal Games Weightlifting medalist-te Sports Minister in lawmpuina hun hmang
content:
25/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 2nd of April, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 3:00 khan Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister of State, Sports & Youth Services Department chuan Khelo India Tribal Games 2026 a Mizoram tana weightlifting a medal la mi pariatte chu MINECO-a a office chamber ah lawmpuina hun a hmanpui.

Sports Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan, "Vawiin ang hi kan nghakhlel a, thil lawmawm tak a ni. Chutihrualin a pawimawh lai chu medal la tura kan thawhrimna leh kan tumna hi a ni a, Mizoram in tihmingtha hle a ni." a ti a. "Kan lawmna tizualtu chu tun tum KITG a medal kan hmuhna discipline pathum hi Empowering Mizoram Sports kan kalpui mek a sport discipline ngaih pawimawh tur kan thlan zing a mi vek kha a ni. Weightlifting kan che tha ber a, wrestling leh hockey ten an dawt a ni." tiin a sawi.

"Khelo India Tribal Games a medal lak hi chu a kalkawng a ni a, kan tum tur chu National Games a ni. A aia sang chu a hunah kan thlir zel anga, tunah chuan a chung leh ami zel kan ngaihtuahnaah kan dah ang." tiin infiammi hlawhtlingte a fuih bawk. Tun hlawhtlinna hian weightlifting-ah Mizoten a takin theihna kan nei tih a nemnghet ni a a hriat thu a sawi. Incentive Cash Award sem leh hunah an dawng thei dawn tih a sawi bawk.

Khelo India Tribal Games (KITG) 2026 hi March 25, 2026 atanga April 3, 2026 chhungin Chhattisgarh a Raipur, Jagdalpur leh Surguja ah te neih a ni a. Hetah hian India ram state hrang hrangte infiamna chi hrang pasarihah inelna neih niin Mizoram hian football, hockey, weightlifting, wrestling leh athletics-ahte infiammi 69 a tir a ni.

Minister Pu Tetea Hmar chuan hmalam hun thlirin, "National Games lo awm tura medal lak theihna neite tan nutrition leh thildangahte inbuatsaihna tha zawk neih theihna turin hma lak mek a ni a. Tin, National Games hi kan thenawm state in thlen a tum a, India hmarchhak state ten game pakhat zel kan chan ve theih dawn avangin keini in weightlifting hi kan thleng dawn a, weightlifting ah nasa zawkin tan kan la dawn a ni." a ti.

Empowering Mizoram Sports kaltlangin weightlifting-ah talent tha haichhuah a nih theih thu sawi bawkin, "Khawtinin, VCP te, GSA te, YMA te pawhin tan la se, weightlifting hi EMS kaltlang hian lo thlang zel se kan duh. Khawtinah naupang chak kan hre duh a, naupang thui tak kal zel thei tur kan hre duh. Weightlifting hi national leh a chunglama medal lak theihna a ni.” tiin a sawi a. Mizo weightlifter te hlawhtlinna in a tihphur thu a sawi.

Vawiin lawmpuina hunah hian Mizoram weightlifting coach in report a pe a. Mizoram Weightlifting Association president Pu Lallianthuama pawhin thu sawiin Sports & Youth Services Director Pu H. Lalhmingthanga chuan thu a sawi bawk.

Mizoram in KITG 2026-ah hian inelna dangah silver medal pahnih leh bronze medal hnih te la tawh bawkin tun dinhmunah a pumpuiah pasarihna an hauh mek.

Vawiin lawmpuina hunah hian Sports & Youth Services Department atangin Commissioner & Secretary Pu V. Lalsangliana, Director Pu H. Lalhmingthanga leh official pawimawh dangte an tel a, infiammite leh an coach-te pawh an tel a ni.

Weightlifting medalists at Khelo India Tribal Games 2026

1. Isac Malsawmtluanga (60kg, Men) - Gold2. Silvan Beihrothathlo (71kg, Women) - Gold3. Zosangzuali (86+ kg, Women) - Gold4. David Zohmingmawia (110+ kg, Men) - Gold5. David Lalzawmdika (100+ kg, Men) - Silver6. Lalfakawma (79 kg, Men) - Silver7. Laithanpuia (65 kg, Men) - Silver8.    Jacob Vanlaltluanga (79 kg, Men) - Bronze

Attachment

title: NOTIFICATION ON MTET, 2026
content:
1/2026-2027

Dated, Aizawl the 2ndApril, 2026 :Mizoram Board of School Education issued notification for the information of all concerned that the Mizoram Teacher Eligibility Test (MTET), 2026 is tentatively scheduled to be conducted by Mizoram Board of School Education (MBSE) in the month of July, 2026. Information Booklet can be downloaded from the MBSE’s official website i.e.www.mbse.edu.inand MBSE online portalwww.mbseonline.com.

Application for the MTET, 2026 is to be done through the MBSE online portal atwww.mbseonline.com. The date of examination will be notified later. Application forms and examination fees can be submitted through the online portal from 16thApril, 2026 to 15thMay, 2026.

The last date of submission of application forms with a late fee of T 300/- only is 23rdMay, 2026. Fees once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstances.

Applicants are advised to carefully go through the information Booklet and the instructions given therein before submitting their application forms. Incomplete/incorrect application shall be rejected without assigning any reason thereof.

title: CHAMPHAIAH CENSUS 2027 CHUNGCHANGAH PRESS BRIEFING NEI
content:
24/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 2nd April 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 1 khan Kum 2027 Chhiarpui kalpui tan mekah vawiin khan Champhai District Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan DC Chamber-ah chanchinbumite briefing a neihpui.

He hunah hian Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan chanchinbumite chu chibai bukin Press Briefing a an kal thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, Kum 2027 Chhiarpui kalpui dan tur leh kalphung tur hrang hrang a tarlang a, digital veka kalpui tur a nih avangin Enumerator te'n in tin tlawhchhuakin Mobile phone hmangin chhiarpui hi kalpui a nih tur thu a tarlang a, chhiarpui atan Enumerator leh Supervisor 201 an awm a, anmahni bialtu Nodal Officer te kaihhruainain training pek an nih tur thu a tarlang bawk. Bawrhsap chuan he chhiarpui neih mekah hian Champhai District mipuite inziaklut vek tur leh chhiarpui kaihhnawiha thawktute tha taka lo thawhpui turin a ngen a ni.

Kum 2027 chhiarpui hi April ni 1, 2026 atangin kalpui tan a ni a, tun tum chhiarpui hi India rama chhiarpui vawi 16 neihna a ni. Chhiarpui hi Cencus Act. 1948 leh Census Rules 1990 behchhanin neih thin a ni a, kum 2011 kha chhiarpui neih hnuhnungber a ni a, chhiarpui 2027 hi chhiarpui vawi 16-na a nih rualin India ramin zalenna a hmuh hnua chhiarpui neih tum 8-na tur a ni bawk.

Chhiarpui hi thawh hniha kalpui tur a ni a, a thawhkhatna hi House Listing & Housing Census, HLO tia sawi bawk niin kum 2026, April ni 1 atangin kalpui tan a ni a, a thawh khatna hian September 2026 thleng a awh dawn a ni . HLO kalpui hma hian ni 15 chhung mahni inziahluhna hun hawn zel a ni dawn a, hemi hun chhung hian chhungkaw tin atanga chhungkaw aiawh zo tur mi pakhat phone hmangin alo inziahluh theih a, zawhna chhan tur leh dahkhat tur awm te a theih ang ang mahnia lo tih lawk theih a ni. A thawhhnihna Population Enumaration hi February 2027 atangin tan leh a ni dawn a, hemi hun chhung hian mimal tinte chanchin – zirna, chenna, fa neih zat leh thil dang dangte lakkhawm a ni ang a, a hun tur leh chanchin lakkhawm turte hi chiang zawka inhriattir leh a ni ang.

Champhai District ah hian bial pali - Champhai Urban, Champhai Rural, Khawbung leh Farkawnah te then a ni a, bial tin vil tur hian Nodal Officer ruat vek an ni bawk.

title: Khawzawl District  Monitoring Committee te  Bana kaih chungchangah meeting nei
content:
23/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, 2nd April, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 khan DC Conference Hall-ah Khawzawl District Monitoring Committee te an chairman leh Bawrhsap ni bawk Pu K. Vanlalthiana hovin Bana kaih chungchangah meeting an nei a ni.

Bawrhsap, Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan Department te’n harsatna an neih dan te zawtin hnathawh danah hian duhthusam tak tak awm lo mahse, kan thawh that chuan hmasawnna hmuhtur a awm a, nidanga kan la hmuh ngailoh hmasawnna tamtak kan hmu thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Theihtawpa kan thawh chuan mipuiten hma an sawn anga, mipuiin hma an sawn chuan ramin hma a sawn dawn tihna a ni a chuvangin theihtawpa thawk theuh turin department tinte a chah bakah Chairman chuan department tin te chu Progress Partner te thlen chin hriatpui a, an hmasawnna te thlithlai kawngah ṭan la leh zual turin a chah bawk a ni.

He meeting ah hian Bana Kaih scheme chungchanga Monitoring Committee  hmalakna hrang hrangte CM Special package, Progress partner-te hmalak tawhna leh an thlenchinte department hrang hrang atangin PowerPoint presentation hmanga thlirho leh ngaihthlak a ni.

Attachment

title: Minister Prof.Lalnilawma'n Maite khuaa Community Nursery (2024 - 2025) a tlawh
content:
22/2026-2027

Dated Saitual the 2nd April 2026 :Vawiin khan RD Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan a bial chhung Maite khuaa Community Nursery siam chu a hmunah a tlawh.

Minister Prof Lalnilawma chuan nursery chu ram tana rotling leh nakin thlenga ram leilung fate tana chhen fakawm thil a nih thu sawiin hma latu RD department te thawhrimna leh inpekna chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, kum tin ram vah chereuva, a dah belh lam a tlem si chuan kum rei lo teah mihringten kan tuar mai dawn a ni, a ti. Mipuite chu theih ang tawka RD Department hmalakna te chu thlawp turin a chah bawk.

He project hi RD dept hnuaiah kum thum (3) chhung atan plan siam niin a tum ber chu rambua te phun khah lehna ni a, MGNREGA hnuaiah mipuiten ramngaw siam a nih leh theih nana hmalakna pawimawh leh lian tak a ni bawk. Project cost hi nuai 80 niin kumin (2026) hi a kum 2-na a ni a, nursery-ah hian thing (variety) chi hrang hrang 28 kui tiah a enkawl mek niin thing tiak hi 50000 (singnga) vel neih mek a ni.

Nursery-a thing kui tiahte hi thing zai chi(commercial tree) te, damdawi (medicinal) atana hman chi thing te leh avenue/ornamental tree te an ni a, thlai tiak ho hi engemaw zat chu kumin chhunga sem chhuan hman tum niin ni pawimawh bik leh Green Mizoram Day ah-te, convergence hna atan te bakah sikulten a thlawna phun tura sem chhuah tur a ni.

Vawiina Minister-in Community Nursery a tlawhnaah hian Pu V.Laldinsanga, PD, DRDO, Pu PC Lallawmkima, AO, DRDO te bakah official te leh khawtlang hruaituten an lo dawng sawng a ni.

Attachment

title: Khawzawlah Ruihhlo man cheng nuai 1300 chuang man hu hal ral
content:
21/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, 2nd April, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00 khan Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK) Khawzawlah, Khawzawl District Drug Disposal Committee te bultumin September 2025 atanga February 2026 chhunga ruihhlo man te halralna hun hman a ni a, Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana’n a hmanpui.

Bawrhsap, Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan Ruihhlo heti zat man a ni chu lungchhiatthlak a tih rualin a manna kawnga thawktu, SP leh a thawhpuite thawhrimna leh thahnemngaihnaah lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Ruihhlo tawlha thalai suattute lakah Khawzawl District chu a zaidawh dawn loh thu sawiin, dan ang taka an chunga na taka action lak a nih tur thu a sawi a, District chhungah hetiang hi a thlen tawhloh nan a zuartu leh lo tawlh thin te pawhin sim a bansan ngei tura a duh thu a sawi. NGO te leh Ruihhlo dona kawnga hmalatu pawl hrang hrang te chu Police te nena thahnemngai taka ruihhlo tawlh ru leh zuarte zawnchhuah kawngah thawk ho zel turin a sawm bawk a ni.

Ruihhlo halralna hun hi Pu Jeremia Vanlalhmachhuana, SDPO Khawzawl-in a kaihruai a. Pu F. Lalbiakzauva, SP Khawzawl chuan inlawmna thu sawiin, Pu Jerry Lalrinsanga, DSP Hqrs Khawzawl atangin report ngaihthlak a ni a, NGO aiawh atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni bawk. He hunah hian Pu Chandrakant Bagoria, SDO (Sadar) bakah District level Drug Disposal Committee te, NCORD member te, Khawzawl Police leh Excise Department-te, NGOs te leh sawm bikte an tel a ni.

Drugs halral te hi Methamphetamine 20.743 kg, ₹119,915,000/- man hu te, Heroin (No 4) 582 grams, ₹11,419,000/- man hu leh Ganja 1.868kgs, ₹9340/- man hu te a ni a. Hemi kaihhnawih ah hian Khawzawl Police Station-ah case 9 ziah luh niin mi 17 man an ni. Vawiin a Drugs halral zawng zawng hi avaiin ₹131,343,340/-man hu a ni.

Nikum 2025 khan Khawzawl PS ah ND & PS case 12 ziahluh niin, Methamphetamine hi 11.612, kgs, ₹15,095,600/- man hu te, Heroin 747 grams, ₹8,480,000/- man hu leh Ganja 5.879 Kgs, ₹29,395/- man hu te man a ni a, case kaihhnawihah hian mi 15 man an ni. Tichuan, kum 2025 chhung a ND & PS case hnuaia ruihhlo man zawng zawng hi avaiin ₹23,604,995/- man hu a ni.

Kumin 2026 January atanga vawiin ni thleng hian ND & PS Case hnuaiah thubuai 5 ziahluh a ni tawh a Methamphetamine 13.873kgs, ₹110,960,000/-man hu Ich Heroin (No 4) 225 grams, ₹4,500,000/- man hu te man a ni a, Case kaihhnawih ah hian mi 10 man an ni. Kumin 2026 a Ruihhlo man zawng zawng chu avaiin ₹115,460,000/- man hu a ni.

Khawzawl District ah hian theihtawp a ruihhlo do niin, District Police te leh Excise & Narcotics Dept. bakah NCORD hmalakna in Supply, Demand leh Harm reduction lamah theihtawp chhuah a hmalak mek zel a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhip DC in dan lova kuhva phurh khap
content:
20/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 2nd April, 2026:Serchhip District chhung khaw hrang hrangah dan lova kuhva phur lirthei an kal thin tih hriat a ni a. Serchhip District chhungah dan phal loha kuhva phurh a lo tawp theih nan Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma chuan Section 163 of Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023-in thuneihna a pek angina a hnuaia mi ang hian khapna thupek a tichhuak.

'Serchhip District chhung khawi hmunah mah dan lova kuhva lak luh leh phurh phal a ni lo.’

He thupek hian thu leh awm hma chu Order chhuah ni April 1, 2026 atanga thla 2(two months) chhung a huam ang.

He thupek zawm lo chu Section 223 of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023 dan hmangin hrem theih an ni ang.

title: Women & Child Development Department, IQAC, Department of Sociology Govt. T. Romana ten Intra-College Level Debate Competition buatsaih
content:
19/2025-2026

Aizawl the 2nd April, 2026 :Vawiin ni 2 April 2026 dar 11:00 AM khan Govt. T. Romana College, RUSA Hall-ah Women & Child Development Department, IQAC, Department of Sociology Govt. T. Romana ten Hmeichhe chunga hleilenna hi hmeichhiate mawhphurhna a ni tih thupui a hmangin Intra-College Level Debate Competition-an buatsaih a, he debate competion hi Pu C. Laldinsanga Asso. Prof in kaihruai in, Principal Govt. T. Romana college Dr. Jenifer Lalbiakdik in welcome speech sawiin- Hmeichhia te dinhmun pawimawhzia leh hlutzia a sawi.

Pi Zoramthangi Chhangte, Director, Women and Child Welfare Dept in a hawnna neiin, Hmeichhiate hlutna leh humhimna atana Department hmalakna te a sawia, Mizo society in hmeichhiate kan en dan leh kan beisei danah her rem ngai a awm thu a sawi.

He debate competition-ah hian Best Debator atan Lallawmkima, Dept. of English thlan a ni a, pahnihna atan Jacob Hmingduhawma, Deptt. of Political Science niin Jenny Lalremthiami, Deptt. of Sociology chu pathumna a ni a, Lawmman pakhatna hian Rs. 5000/- leh Citation a keng a, Lawmman Pahnihna in Rs. 3000/- leh citation kengin Lawmman pathumna in Rs. 2000/- leh Citation a keng bawk a, inelna a rel zawng zawngte participation prize leh certificate pek vek an ni a, Dr. Dorothy Zonunsangi, Coordinator, IQAC in lawm thu sawiin hun a khar inDebate competition hi students ten an hlawkpui hle a ni.

title: INDO- BANGLADESH BORDER TRADE CENTRE TUR KAWRPUI CHHUAH BRIDGE SIAM THUAI A TUL THU PARLIAMENT SESSION AH RAJYA SABHA MP PU K.VANLALVENAN A SAWI
content:
18/2026-2027

Dated April 2nd, 2026:Parliament budget session neih mek ah vawiin khan Rajya Sabha MP Pu K.Vanlalvena chuan Bangladesh nena insumdawn tawnna tura kum sawm kal ta a inremna siam tawh tun thlenga hma lakna awm mumal lo leh Kawrpui lei dawh thuai a tul thu a sawi chhuak.

Pu K. Vanlavena chuan Union Home Ministry bul tumin  Khawthlang Tuipui chungah cheng vaibelchhe 54 senna tur lei(bridge) dawh tan a ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Kum 2021 ah Bangladesh ramri hrula BSF camp engemawzat a tlawh thu te, BSF camp thenkhat chu eng kawng mahin a pawh loh thu leh henglai hmuna damlo te pawh inkalpawhna kawng a awm loh avanga an boral phah thu te BSF hotute leh khawtlang hotu ten a hnena an lo thlen thu te a sawi chhuak. He harsatna sutkian a nih theih nan hian Union Home Ministry ah Khawthlang Tuipui chungah lei dawh tura ngenna a thlen thu leh a ngenna ngaipawimawha Khawthlang Tuipui lei dawh tan a nih tak avanga Union Home Minister Pu Amit Shah chunga a lawm thu a sawi bawk a. He Khawthlang Tuipui chunga lei dawh hi sipai te tana a tangkai tur thu te, ramri bula cheng mipui te tana a tangkai tur thu te sawiin Sawrkar laipui hian ram hnufualte pawh a ngaihthah lo tih hei hian a tih lan thu a sawi bawk.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM UNIVERSAL HEALTHCARE SCHEME (MUHCS) 2.0 CARD CHUNGCHANGA HRIATTIRNA
content:
17/2026-2027

Aizawl the 2nd April, 2026 :MUHCS 2.0 chu April Ni 1, 2026 atangin hman tan a ni dawn a, Govt Employees/PE leh General Beneficiaries (mipui nawlpui man chawia inziak lut) te chuan MUHCS hmang turin MUHCS card an neih hmasak ngei a ngai a. CSS/GIA, Pensioner leh AB PM-JAY (Golden Card) hmang thei tan erawh tun dinhmun ah MUHCS Card hi siam a la ngai lo thung. CSS/GIA leh Pensioner tan MUHCS Subscription form hmangin MUHCS hnuaiah enkawlna an dawng thei a, AB PM-JAY chhungkua tan Golden card hmangin MUHCS hnuaiah enkawlna a dawn theih bawk.

MUHCS Card hi Common Service Centre (CSC) hnenah emaw damdawi in luh rualin empanelled damdawi inah siam theih a ni a,muhcs.mizoram.gov.inah mahni a siam mai theih a ni bawk.

MUHCS Card hi siam hun bituk a awm lo a, mahni remchan dana siam mai theih a ni.

title: Serchhip DLC on Model Solar Village in Buangpui khaw tana project siam an pawm
content:
16/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 2nd April, 2026:Pradhan Mantri Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana (PM-SGMBY) hnuaia hmalakna chungchangah vawiin khan Pu Paul L Khuma hoin District Level Committee on Model Solar Village chu DC Office Chamber-ah an thukhawm.PM-SGMBY model solar village atan Buangpui khua chu thlan fel a lo ni tawh a. Vawiin meeting ah ZEDA ten DPR an buatsaih chu thlirho a ni. DPR hi uluk taka zirho a nih hnuah committee chuan siamthat ngai lai te siamtha in lungrual takin an pawmpui a ni.He project kaltlang hian Hybrid Solar PV chu Buangpui Community Hall leh Panchayat Office ah te vuah tum a ni a. Off Grid Solar Power Plant chu Self-Help Group Building pahnihah vuah tum a ni bawk. 7.5kWp a chak Solar Street Light engemaw zat Buangpui khuaah hian vuah a ni dawn a. Heng solar atanga an sum hmuh te hi Buangpui khua hian an khaw hmasawnna hna thawh nan an hmang tangkai thei dawn a ni.DC Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan ZEDA team te leh Committee member te thahnemngai tak a thawk tur leh hmasawnna kawnga mipuite thil tha kawhhmuhtu ni tura fuihin an inpeknaah lawmthu a sawi a. Buangpui khaw hmasawnna leh boruak vawn thianghlimna kawnga an hmalaknaah theihtawp chhuahpui turin a sawm a ni.

Attachment

title: MLA Er. H. Ginzalala'n Champhaiah puan thui zirna kharna hun hmanpui
content:
15/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 2nd April 2026:Champhaiah Commerce & Industries Department, Govt. of Mizoram chuan nimin khan puan thui zir kharna hun leh certificate semna hun hman a ni a, Er. H. Ginzalala, Champhai North bialtu MLA leh Adviser to CM (Technical) ni bawk chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

He hun hi Knitting & Tailoring Centre, DIC Champhai ah hman niin Pu Vanlalpara, DCIO, Champhai chuan a kaihruai a ni.

Khuallian Er. H. Ginzalala chuan thu sawiin, puan thui zir mi 11 laiin an zirchhuak thei leh anmahni hak tur an thui thei nghal mai chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin hlawhtlinna ropui tak a nih thu a sawi a, Batch thar tileh nghal turin Advertisement pawh chhuah lehnghal tha a tih thu a sawi a, Sawrkar hmalakna bawkin tar enkawl dan training thla thum chhung buatsaih niin hlawhtling taka zawhfel a nih tawh thu a sawi bawk. Sawrkarin intodelh kan nih theihna tur chak takin hma a lak mek a, hei hi a hlawhtlin theihna tur chuan thalai te'n kut themthiam thil an neih a tul thu tarlangin, hemi atan hian project tam tak kalpui zel an tum thu leh thalaite kutthemthiamna pek zel an tum tih a tarlang bawk. Hna kan thawh reng rengin kahpah lutuk a thiltih hian hlawhtlinna a tihthuanawp theih thu a sawi a, ngaihtuahna zau tak pu a, tihdan phung kan lo neih tawh thinte paih vek a, hma kan sawnna tur leh kan hlawhtlinna tur a nih chuan kan tih ngai loh pawh tithei tura rilru inbuatsaih a tul thu a sawi.

Khuallian chuan traning zo tawhte chu trainingah duhtawk mai lo turin a chah a, an hun kal zel turah an zirlaia an zir thin bakah thiam thar nei zel turin a fuih a, puan thui kawngah mi tih ngai loh design thar neih tum theuh turin a fuih a, an kal zelna turah duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Pu Vanlaltluanga, LDC i/c K&T Training Centre chuan kum 2019 - 2020 kha training an buatsaih theih hnuhnungber a nih thu sawiin Sawrkar hmalakna a zarah kum 2025, October ni 1 atang khan training kalpui leh tan a nih thu a sawi a, mi 15 te'n training hi an kal a, mi 11 te'n hlawhtling takin an zirchhuak tih a tarlang bawk.

He hunah hian Instructress Pi Lalrinmawii bakah Trainees Lalhmangaihzuali leh Emily Vanlalhmingduhzuali te hnen atangin thusawi tawi ngaihthlak a ni a, puan thui zirchhuak mi 11 te hnenah Certificate semchhuah nghal a ni a, Certificate hi Khuallian Er. H. Ginzalala chuan a sem nghal a, Certificate bakah Stipend a sem nghal bawk.

Attachment

Pu Vanlaltlana, District Social Welfare Department, Mamit in inkhawm hi kaihhruaiin, khuallian Er. H. Lalzirliana, MLA in inkhawm a hman pui.

Khuallian Er. H Lalzirliana, MLA Mamit chuan Social Welfare leh MFM te’n hetiang thalaite tana upate enkawl dan inzirtirna an buatsaih thei hi a lawmawm a tiin hna hmuh nan leh mahni inchhungah tangkai taka an hman theihna a ni tiin a fuih bawk.

title: DISTRIBUTION OF CERTIFICATE FOR GERIATRIC CAREGIVER TRAINEES
content:
12/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, the 2nd April, 2026:Nimin khan Social Welfare leh Mission Foundation Movement te tangkawpin a an buatsaih Geriatric Caregiver zir chhuak mi 25 hnenah certificate hlanna inkhawm EF & CC Auditorium, Bethel Veng, Champhaiah hman a ni.

Caleb Lalnunpuia, Project Manager MFM in inkhawm hi kaihhruaiin, Upa H. Lalzova , Vice President MUP, Champhai District chu khuallian a ni.

Khuallian Upa H. Lalzova chuan kum upa lamte hi ngaihsak bik ngai, mi dang tanpui mamawh ngawih ngawih an ni a, an ni ang enkawl tura thalai 25 laiin thiamna thar an zir chhuak thei hi lawmawm a tiin hetiang scheme kalpui tura Social Welfare Department leh Mission Foundation Movement tangkawpin hma an la chu kum upate tan chuan a lawmawm hle a ni a ti. Zirchhuak zawng zawng te an awmna theuhvah malsawmna ni turin duhsakna a hlan thu a sawi bawk.

C. Lalremsiama Tutor MFM School of Nursing in tanna hun a hmang a, Pi Christina Zothanpuii, Principal MFM School of Nursing in training kalpui a nih dan a sawi bawk.
